meta.name: PERMA Profiler
meta.description: The PERMA Profiler is a 23-item well-being measure based on Seligman's PERMA model, assessing Positive Emotion, Engagement, Relationships, Meaning, and Accomplishment.
meta.author: Butler & Kern (2016)
meta.reference: Butler J, Kern ML. The PERMA-Profiler: A brief multidimensional measure of flourishing. International Journal of Wellbeing. 2016;6(3):1-48.
meta.instruction: Please rate each of the following questions on a scale from 0 to 10 based on your honest feelings.

questions.text: How often do you feel positive?
How often do you become absorbed in what you are doing?
How often do you feel loved?
How often do you feel that what you do in your life is valuable and worthwhile?
In general, to what extent do you feel contented?
To what extent do you generally feel you have a sense of direction in your life?
To what extent do you receive help and support from others when you need it?
How often do you feel you are making progress towards accomplishing your goals?
How often are you able to handle your responsibilities?
In general, to what extent do you feel excited and interested in things?
In general, to what extent do you lead a purposeful and meaningful life?
In general, to what extent do you feel that what you do in your life is engaging?
How satisfied are you with your personal relationships?
How often do you achieve the important goals you have set for yourself?
In general, to what extent do you feel that you have a sense of purpose?
How often do you feel anxious?
How often do you feel angry?
How often do you feel sad?
In general, how would you say your health is?
How satisfied are you with your current physical health?
Compared to others of your same age and sex, how is your health?
To what extent do you feel lonely in your daily life?
In general, to what extent do you feel happy?

ranges.label: Low Well-being
ranges.description: Your overall PERMA score is low, suggesting significant room for improvement in well-being.
suggestions: Try keeping a daily gratitude journal to cultivate positive emotions
Seek activities that fully engage your attention and skills

ranges.label: Moderate Well-being
ranges.description: Your well-being is at a moderate level, with some dimensions having room for growth.
suggestions: Focus on improving dimensions where you scored lower
Strengthen social connections and relationship quality
Identify sources of meaning and purpose in your life

ranges.label: High Well-being
ranges.description: Your overall well-being is high, with balanced development across dimensions.
suggestions: Helping others can further enhance your own well-being
Continue monitoring balance across all dimensions
